popularStory.headline: Ranulf le Meschin, 3rd Earl of Chester (1070-1129)
popularStory.description: Ranulf le Meschin, 3rd Earl of Chester (1070-1129) was a Norman magnate based in northern and central England. Originating in Bessin in Normandy, Ranulf made his career in England thanks to his kinshi …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulf Meschin於大約1070年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Ranulf de Briquessart25歲，母親Marguerite d'Avranches17歲。他於1097年與Lucy of Bolingbroke結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1129年1月在英國爾切斯特享年60歲，埋葬在英國爾切斯特。

zh-hans.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: 英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulf Meschin于大约1070年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Ranulf de Briquessart25岁，母亲Marguerite d'Avranches17岁。他于1097年与Lucy of Bolingbroke结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1129年1月在英国爾切斯特享年60岁，埋葬在英国爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Meschin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Meacham
meanings: English: variant of Machen . It may occasionally also be a variant of Measham, a habitational name from Measham in Leicestershire. The place takes its name from the river Mease (from Old English mēos ‘marsh, bog’) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Ranulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, Reginulfr, derived from regin ‘advice, decision’ + úlfr ‘wolf’. This was introduced into Scotland and northern England by Scandinavian settlers in the early Middle Ages and modern use is largely confined to these areas.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulf Meschin was born about 1070, in Normandy, France, his father, Ranulf de Briquessart, was 25 and his mother, Marguerite d'Avranches, was 17. He married Lucy of Bolingbroke in 1097. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in January 1129, in Chester, Cheshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Chester, Cheshire, England.

fr.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulf Meschin est né environ 1070, à Normandie, France, son père, Ranulf de Briquessart, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Marguerite d'Avranches, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lucy of Bolingbroke en 1097. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1129, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulf Meschin um 1070 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulf de Briquessart 25 und seine Mutter Marguerite d'Avranches 17. Er hat 1097 Lucy of Bolingbroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1129 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England und wurde in Chester, Cheshire, England begraben.

ht.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulf Meschin è nato il circa 1070 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ranulf de Briquessart, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite d'Avranches, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Lucy of Bolingbroke nel 1097. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1129, nel Chester, Cheshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Chester, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulf Meschinが約1070年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Ranulf de Briquessartは25歳，母Marguerite d'Avranchesは17歳であった。1097年にLucy of Bolingbrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1129年1月にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで60歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulf Meschin(이)가 대략 1070년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulf de Briquessart(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite d'Avranches(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1097년 Lucy of Bolingbroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1129년 1월 영국 체실르 체스터에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulf Meschin nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Ranulf de Briquessart, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite d'Avranches, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy of Bolingbroke em 1097. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1129, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulf Meschin родился около 1070 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ranulf de Briquessart было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite d'Avranches, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy of Bolingbroke в 1097 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер январь 1129 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности честир, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulf Meschin nació aproximadamente 1070, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ranulf de Briquessart, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Marguerite d'Avranches, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Lucy of Bolingbroke en 1097. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en enero de 1129, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
